apis.name: Open-Meteo Weather
apis.description: Free weather forecast API with no authentication required. Provides current weather, forecasts, and historical data for worldwide locations.
apis.notes: Completely free, no rate limits for reasonable usage, no signup required

apis.description: Convert city names to GPS coordinates. Use this first, then plug the coordinates into Open-Meteo Weather API. Same provider, free, no API key.
apis.notes: Pairs perfectly with Open-Meteo Weather - search for city first, then get weather

apis.name: OpenAlex
apis.description: Free, open catalog of 250+ million scholarly works (papers, theses, books) with authors, citations, institutions, and topics. No API key needed.
apis.notes: Completely free, rate-limited to 100k requests per day without key. Register for a free key for 1M/day.

apis.name: Nominatim
apis.description: Free geocoding API from OpenStreetMap. Convert addresses to GPS coordinates (forward) or coordinates to addresses (reverse). No API key needed.
apis.notes: Free for reasonable use. Requires User-Agent header identifying your app. Max 1 request per second.

apis.name: Have I Been Pwned
apis.description: Check if passwords have been exposed in data breaches using k-anonymity. Your password never leaves your device. No API key needed.
apis.notes: Uses k-anonymity model - only first 5 chars of SHA-1 hash sent. Free, no rate limits published. Completely free by Troy Hunt.

apis.name: Chess.com
apis.description: Free API to query Chess.com player profiles, stats, games, tournaments, and more. No authentication required.
apis.notes: Completely free, no rate limits documented. Public data only (player profiles, games, tournaments).

apis.name: HTTPBin
apis.description: Free HTTP request and response debugging service. See exactly what your HTTP client sends - headers, IP, form data, JSON, and more. No API key needed.
apis.notes: Free to use. Also supports POST, PUT, DELETE methods. Can inspect headers, IP, auth, status codes, delays, and more.

apis.name: wttr.in
apis.description: Free weather API with a curl-friendly interface. Returns JSON or plain text weather reports for any location worldwide. No API key needed.
apis.notes: Completely free. Add ?format=j1 for JSON. Also supports plain text, PNG, and ANSI output. Used heavily in terminals.

apis.name: Open Topo Data
apis.description: Free elevation API. Get elevation in meters for any GPS coordinate using various elevation datasets (etopo1, ned10m, etc.). No API key needed.
apis.notes: Free. Multiple datasets: etopo1 (global), ned10m (US), nzdem (NZ), etc. Max 100 locations per request.

apis.name: npm Registry
apis.description: Free API to query the npm package registry. Get package metadata, versions, dependencies, downloads, and maintainers. No API key needed.
apis.notes: Completely free, no rate limits published. Returns full package.json metadata. Also supports search endpoint.

apis.name: Affirmations.dev
apis.description: Free positive affirmation API. Returns a random uplifting affirmation as JSON. Simple, no authentication, no rate limits.
apis.notes: Super simple - just one endpoint. Returns {affirmation: '...'} format. Free for any use.

apis.name: isEven API
apis.description: Free parity check API. Returns whether a number is even or odd, with a random advertisement. Silly but fun. No API key needed.
apis.notes: 100% free. Returns iseven boolean plus a random ad. Designed as a joke/novelty API but fully functional.

apis.name: FreeToGame
apis.description: Free API listing free-to-play games across PC, browser, and mobile platforms. Browse, filter by genre/platform, and get game details. No API key needed.
apis.notes: Completely free. Filter by platform (pc, browser, all), genre, and tag. Returns game title, thumbnail, description, and links.

apis.name: USGS Earthquakes
apis.description: Free USGS Earthquake API providing real-time earthquake data worldwide. GeoJSON format with magnitude, location, depth, and time. No API key needed.
apis.notes: Completely free. Multiple feeds: 2.5_day, all_day, significant_week, etc. Also supports GeoJSON, CSV, and KML formats.

apis.name: arXiv
apis.description: Free API to search 2.5+ million scholarly papers across physics, math, computer science, and more. Returns paper metadata including title, authors, abstract, and categories.
apis.notes: Returns Atom XML format. Free, no rate limits documented. Supports complex search queries (AND, OR, ANDNOT). Max 30000 results per query.

apis.name: Spaceflight News
apis.description: Free API for spaceflight news articles. Browse the latest articles about rocket launches, space missions, and space industry developments. No API key needed.
apis.notes: Completely free. Supports pagination (limit/offset), search, and filtering. Returns title, summary, image URL, news site, and publication date.
